body: `go test ./... -count=1` fails before completion because tests using `httptest.NewServer` cannot bind a local port in this sandbox. Examples include `service_http_provider_test.go:372`, `cmd/agent/update_test.go:163`, `internal/core/loop_external_test.go:65`, and provider conformance tests.

post-merge review: BLOCK (flagged for human)
